creator: fenner@parc.xerox.com
text:
Including in previous PR so kern/8488 can be closed

------- Forwarded Message

Date: Thu, 29 Oct 1998 11:16:26 PST
From: Stephanie Wehner <_@r4k.net>
Subject: kern/8488: ipsec for ipv4

	I forgot to include patches for those files in the previous pr *blush*
	They go with the ipsec ported from OpenBSD
